title: 🎉 Paper Accepted by IWQoS 2026
excerpt: Our paper "Square: Towards Sharing Internet-Scale GPU Clouds Fairly and Efficiently" has been accepted by the IEEE/ACM International Symposium on Quality of Service (IWQoS 2026).
excerptHtml: Our paper "Square: Towards Sharing Internet-Scale GPU Clouds Fairly and Efficiently" has been accepted by IEEE/ACM International Symposium on Quality of Service (IWQoS 2026).
